about: Completed a Bachelors in Computer Technology (Computer Science) at the University of Bergen and now pursuing a joint Master's program in Software Engineering (UiB/HVL) with courses in machine learning. I have a very broad range of interests which I like to spend time on. Some of these worth mentioning: all of sports, sailing, cars and engines, mechanical engineering, quantum computing, machine learning and AI, low-level computing and assembly code, new and old technologies in all aspects but with a heavier emphasis on cars, boats and airplanes as well as computers of course.

experience.title: Student Software Engineer
experience.details: Building an enterprise chatbot using various tools and technologies, working along the whole tech stack, including architecture, backend, frontend, networking, security, databases.; IT/OT work with AVEVA PI systems (PI AF, PI Vision, PI SMT) related to time-series data for energy sector clients.
experience.linkLabel: AVEVA PI systems (PI AF, PI Vision, PI SMT)

experience.details: Delivered bread and pastries to private customers and bakeries.

education.program: Joint Master's Program in Software Engineering (with ML courses)

highlights: Bachelor in Computer Science: Computer Technology completed; started joint Master in Software Engineering (UiB/HVL).
Experience working in small teams handling multiple responsibilities.
Broad exposure to technologies: Python, AI/ML-libraries, several NoSQL databases, Java, C#/.NET, TypeScript/JavaScript, Angular, SQL, C, Haskell, Kotlin, Linux, Git, HTML/CSS.
Implemented various different projects in both spare-time and through university, to further develop my skills and interests.
Fond of optimalizing workflow with experience using vim, tmux, ssh, terminal work and Linux systems daily
Organizational development and administration as leader of ITxBergen.

projects.name: Portfolio Website
projects.description: This site. Built with React + Vite and custom Three.js starfield/galaxy background.

projects.name: Enterprise Chatbot
projects.description: Implementing an enterprise chatbot where I work in the whole tech stack. Handling backend business logic, architectural choices, networking, databases, machine learning techniques, RAG apporaches

projects.name: Personal AI Homelab
projects.description: I implemented my very own completely custom agent, running locally. I used open-source LLMs from huggingface, running locally on my own desktop through vLLM. I use RAG techniques to enrich the LLM with context from Qdrant where I have embedded the whole of english Wikipedia. The chatbot-agent is also toolcapable where I have implemented several tools the chatbot can call if needed, whereas a selfhosted SearXNG instance, calculator, weather API, current time, create and read files, with more to come.

projects.name: Machine Learning Experimentation
projects.description: I am experimenting with various machine learning models and techniques, where as I experiment with quantum computing, raw machine learning algorithms in Numpy only, and embedding models.

projects.description: Full-stack application for shared-housing households with aim to imrove common household issues in shared-housing.

projects.name: Group Project - System Development
projects.description: A group project where we developed a 2D game using LibGDX in Java for a university course, INF112 at UiB.

skills: AI/ML work and applications of AI/ML for both personal use and enterprise
